name: test_archive_and_unarchive_child_via_cohort_upload
description:
Test: Archive a child via cohort upload and then unarchive by re-uploading.
Steps:
1. Import a fixed child cohort file.
2. Archive the child from the children page.
3. Re-import the same cohort file.
4. Verify the child is unarchived.
Verification:
- Child is archived after first import and unarchived after second import.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Archive a child via cohort upload and then unarchive by re-uploading.
Steps:

  1. Import a fixed child cohort file.
  2. Archive the child from the children page.
  3. Re-import the same cohort file.
  4. Verify the child is unarchived.
    Verification:
  • Child is archived after first import and unarchived after second import.

setup_fixed_child = None
page = <Page url='https://qa.mavistesting.com/patients?q=TURNER%2C+Charlie&%5Bprogramme_types%5D%5B%5D=&programme_status_grou...ate_of_birth_month=&date_of_birth_year=&archived=0&missing_nhs_number=0&missing_nhs_number=1&aged_out_of_programmes=0'>
file_generator = <mavis.test.data.file_generator.FileGenerator object at 0x7ffaa9807280>
children = {'HPV': [Child(first_name='Charlie', last_name='TURNER', nhs_number='9907894796', address=('Studio 39', 'Hudson Street...ull_name='Miss Holly Coleman', relationship=<Relationship.MUM: 'Mum'>, email_address='christineoliver@example.org')))]}

    @issue("MAV-909")
    @issue("MAV-1716")
    @pytest.mark.bug
    def test_archive_and_unarchive_child_via_cohort_upload(
        setup_fixed_child,
        page,
        file_generator,
        children,
    ):
        """
        Test: Archive a child via cohort upload and then unarchive by re-uploading.
        Steps:
        1. Import a fixed child cohort file.
        2. Archive the child from the children page.
        3. Re-import the same cohort file.
        4. Verify the child is unarchived.
        Verification:
        - Child is archived after first import and unarchived after second import.
        """
        child = children[Programme.HPV][0]
    
        ChildrenSearchPage(page).search.search_for_child_name_with_all_filters(str(child))
>       ChildrenSearchPage(page).search.click_child(child)
